title: Asset
content:
# Asset


## Properties

- **asset_type_name** (`string`): Unique identifier `name` of the Asset Type linked to this Asset.
- **asset_type_title** (`string`): Display name (`title`) of the Asset Type linked to this Asset.
- **created** (`string`): UTC time when the Asset was created, formatted in RFC 3339.
- **name** (`string`): Unique identifier `name` of the Asset.
- **properties** (`array`): Array of custom properties. These properties are not used by the Kelvin Platform and are for end-user use only.
- **in_use_by** (`array`): List of workload sources that are using this Asset.
- **status** (`object`): Asset's status information.
- **title** (`string`): Display name (`title`) of the Asset.
- **updated** (`string`): UTC time when any Asset keys were last updated, formatted in RFC 3339.
summary: Object with properties: asset_type_name, asset_type_title, created, name, properties

asset_type_name.description: Unique identifier `name` of the Asset Type linked to this Asset.

asset_type_title.description: Display name (`title`) of the Asset Type linked to this Asset.

created.description: UTC time when the Asset was created, formatted in RFC 3339.

properties.description: Array of custom properties. These properties are not used by the Kelvin Platform and are for end-user use only.

name.description: Unique identifier `name` for the Asset Property. The string can only contain lowercase alphanumeric characters and `.`, `_` or `-` characters.

title.description: Display name (title) for the Asset Property. You can use any character, numeric, space and special character in this key.

in_use_by.description: List of workload sources that are using this Asset.

last_seen.description: UTC time when the Asset was last seen, formatted in RFC 3339.

updated.description: UTC time when any Asset keys were last updated, formatted in RFC 3339.
